description:
PLAY THE HABROMANIA DEMO NOW!! It's finally out on Steam and Kickstarter (There's also a discount on Kickstarter for the first 24 hours, to thank the early backers!)
.
 I actually can't believe it's finally reall, my stomach was in knots all week. I haven't felt this nervous and excited and proud over anything before, not even graduating highschool or college. My dream for years was to make a video game, but I never thought it'd actually happen. This project has been a labor of love for the past two years, when I first had the idea for it while doodling in class. I am so incredibly greatful for yall's support and the hard work of the team. Go play through the demo, and if you enjoy the game, please check out the Kickstarter page! That's where we'll be looking for support to turn this demo into a full game. Or share the demo with your friends and favorite streamers! Anything is incredibly appreciated.
.
Love you guys. I'm gonna go pass out now- I haven't slept in like 4 days.
@symphony_sonata
